description: Single donut chart that fills from 0 to the target percentage with value and label in the center

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Chart title, e.g. 'PHISHING SHARE OF ALL ATTACKS'
fields.DONUT_VALUE: The percentage shown in the center, e.g. '44%'
fields.DONUT_LABEL: Short label below the value, e.g. 'OF ALL BREACHES'
fields.CONTEXT_TEXT: One line of context shown below the chart, e.g. 'Based on IBM Cost of a Data Breach Report 2024'
